work_package_result.summary: Added strict planning schemas and graph validation for package lifecycle, references, dependencies, owner gates, batch envelopes, debt dates and completion evidence.

passed: uv run python -m unittest discover -s tools/tests: 28 tests

review.method: R1 self-review against WP-M00-004 and IMPL-03 section 15
findings_closed: Malformed schema records now produce diagnostics without crashing graph validation
Owner decision evidence must resolve and belong to the referenced package
Completion evidence must include every package acceptance ID
Blocked and partial result packets may represent zero-change outcomes

observability_changes: Every validation error reports a repository-relative file and JSON field
known_limitations: Milestone-named debt review gates remain human-reviewed; obsolete ISO debt dates are rejected automatically
